title: Fix score champion promotion mutation composite key update
description: Promoting a score version through the live MCP score_set_champion path failed with GraphQL error: updating the ScoreVersion isFeatured field requires all fields for the byScoreIdAndIsFeaturedAndCreatedAt composite key, including scoreId and createdAt. Fix the promotion implementation and cover it with tests, then verify through the CLI MCP client harness.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Fixed execute_tactus score.set_champion routing and mutation inputs. Incoming promoted version updates include scoreId, createdAt, and isFeatured for the composite index; outgoing previous-champion updates now write metadata only. Verified with focused unit tests, full Tactus runtime tests, optimizer config tests, and a CLI MCP harness call against the current working tree.
